subcodes.first_line: ...It is my hope that thou mayest be confirmed in that important cause, which is of greatest service to the world of humanity, for those poor children are dying of hunger and their condition is truly heart-rending
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خانم محترمه جواب نامه شما بتاریخ ۹ کانون ثانی ۱۹۲۰ بود رسید و از مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
